contexts: There is a considerable of evidence indicating that MMP-9 is up-regulated after the onset of SAH insults, associated with the disruption of BBB permeability and the formation of vasogenic edema (Feiler et al., 2011; Guo et al., 2010a; Guo et al., 2010b; Sozen et al., 2009; Suzuki et al., 2010).

In our present research, we noted that MMP-9 activation occurred in both neural cells and microvascular endothelial cells, which was consistent with previous reports (Guo et al., 2010b; Lee and Lo, 2004; Liu et al., 2012; Tsubokawa et al., 2006).
